observations.archetype_gloss: The integrated center of the psyche, representing wholeness and truth
observations.summary: Dan experiences a profound awakening to a long-avoided truth, marking a pivotal moment of self-realization and emergence of his true self.

evidence.quote: It was the sound of a man waking from a dream that had shown him something true, and truth, when you've been running from it for seven years, hits like a fist to the solar plexus.
